0.details:
what caused the argument
reflection on my wrong doings (acknowledge my mistakes)
how i feel about everything that happened (expressing my remorse)
repairing the relationship
taking responsibility for my mistakes
an offering to make amends
promise to change
0.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I’m writing to apologize for our argument last Tuesday evening. I realize now that I dismissed your ideas and raised my voice when you were simply trying to share your perspective. I’m sorry for interrupting you, placing blame unfairly, and letting my frustrations get the better of me.

I’ve reflected on my behavior and accept responsibility for neglecting your feelings and needs. I deeply regret the hurt I caused and feel awful about the tension between us. You deserve respect and understanding, and I failed to give you that in the moment.

I value our relationship more than any disagreement, and I want to make things right. Please let me know how I can make amends—whether over coffee, by listening without judgment, or helping you with anything you need. I promise to be more patient, open-minded, and calm going forward.

Sincerely,  
your friend
0.final_version:
Dear Sabelo,

I’m writing to tell you that I apologize for our argument last Tuesday. I realize now that I neglected your ideas and raised my voice when you were simply just trying to share your opinion. I’m very sorry for interrupting you, placing blame unfairly, and letting my frustrations get the better of me.

I’ve reflected on my behavior and accepted responsibility for neglecting your feelings and needs. I deeply regret the hurt I caused and feel awful about the tension between us. You deserve respect and a listening friend, and I failed to give you that in the moment.

I value our relationship more than any argument, and I want to make things right between us. Please let me know how I can make amends, whether over coffee, by listening without judgment, or helping you with anything you need. I promise to be more patient, open-minded, and calm going forward.

Sincerely,  
your friend 
Karabo

1.details:
acknowledgement for his help
why it was important to me
personal appreciation
promise to always be there for him as he was for me
how it made me feel
how surprised i was
1.model_generation:
Dear Michael,

I can’t thank you enough for dropping everything to help me move into my new apartment last Saturday. Your willingness to lug heavy boxes and assemble furniture made the process smooth and stress-free. It meant so much to me because I was overwhelmed by deadlines and worried I couldn’t manage alone. Your kindness and reliability reminded me how fortunate I am to have you in my life. I was surprised by how quickly you arrived, and seeing your willingness to drop your own plans for my sake warmed my heart and reminded me I’m never truly alone. Your support lifted a weight off my shoulders and filled me with gratitude. I appreciate your generosity and how you step in when I need you. I promise to return the favor and always be there for you, no matter what. Thank you again for being an amazing friend.

Sincerely,
Alex
1.final_version:
Dear Michael,

I can’t thank you enough for dropping everything to help me move into my new apartment last Saturday. Your willingness to carry heavy boxes and assemble furniture made the process smooth and stress-free. It meant so much to me because I was overwhelmed by all the work that had to be done and worried, I couldn’t manage alone. Your kindness and reliability reminded me how lucky I am to have you in my life. I was surprised by how quickly you arrived, and seeing your willingness to drop your own plans for my sake warmed my heart and reminded me I’m never truly alone. Your support lifted a weight off my shoulders and filled me with gratitude and joy. I appreciate your kindness and how you step in when I need you. I promise to return the favor and always be there for you, no matter what. Thank you again for being an amazing friend.

Sincerely,
Alex

2.details:
life update
memories and reflections
emotional connections- what ive missed and what they missed, how much i appreciate their support and how ive grown in ways theyd be proud
reconnection- work, family passions
2.model_generation:
Dear friend,

I hope this letter finds you well. Life has been full of change: I recently stepped into a new role as a project manager at WorkCo, and every day brings fresh challenges that push me to grow. At home, our family evenings over home-cooked meals have become small celebrations of togetherness.

I often think back to our late-night talks under the stars, dreaming about future adventures. I’ve missed your laughter and the way you always reminded me to follow my passions. Your support during tough times still means the world to me, and I’ve grown in ways I know would make you proud.

I’ve picked up painting again and discovered how soothing it is after a busy day. I even started a small garden project, nurturing fresh herbs on my windowsill. Let’s reconnect soon—maybe swap stories over a video call or weekend visit. I can’t wait to hear about your journey.

Warmly,  
your friend.
2.final_version:
Dear Tumelo,

I hope this letter finds you well. Life has been full of change. I recently stepped into a new role as a project manager at WorkCo, and every day brings fresh challenges that push me to grow. At home, our family evenings over home-cooked meals have become small celebrations of togetherness.

I often think back to our late-night talks under the stars, dreaming about future adventures. I’ve missed your laughter and the way you always reminded me to follow my passions. Your support during tough times still means the world to me, and I’ve grown in ways I know would make you proud.

I’ve picked up painting again and discovered how soothing and relaxing it is after a busy day. I even started a small garden project, nurturing fresh herbs on my windowsill. Let’s link up soon, maybe swap stories over a video call or weekend visit. I can’t wait to hear about your journey.

Warmly,  
Kareabo.

3.model_generation: I can only imagine how heavy things have been lately as you juggle the stress of work, personal challenges, and the constant feeling of being overwhelmed. It hurts me to see you facing these struggles, and I want you to know that your feelings are completely valid. You’ve shown so much strength just by getting through each day, even when it feels impossible. I’m here for you—ready to listen without judgment, to sit quietly by your side, or to help you brainstorm next steps whenever you’re ready. You don’t have to carry this burden alone. Lean on me and let me support you in whatever way feels right. You matter deeply, and your well-being is so important. Together, we’ll navigate this, one step at a time. I believe in you, and I’m not going anywhere. Whenever you need a break, a laugh, or a quiet moment, I’m here—just reach out.

4.details:
share a moment of the deceased, something joyful and something meaningful
what made them stand out and how they treated others
expressing how sorrowful i am and how affected i am
reassure his family members
4.model_generation:
Dear Michael’s family,

I was heartbroken to learn of Michael’s passing. I’ll always remember our spring picnic last year when he taught everyone to cast a fishing line. His laughter as he untangled my line remains one of my fondest memories—a moment that captured his warmth and generosity.

Michael’s kindness stood out in everything he did: offering words of encouragement when a project stalled or volunteering to help a neighbor. He made each person feel valued and supported. His passion for mentoring younger colleagues inspired me to pursue new goals. I feel sorrow at his loss, and his absence leaves a void I cannot express.

Please know you are in my thoughts and prayers during this difficult time. May you find comfort in the love Michael shared. His spirit will live on in all the lives he touched, and I am here for you.

With heartfelt sympathy,
Your friend
4.final_version:
dear Thomas,
I am very sorry to hear about your loss. I can only imagine how difficult it is for you and i need you to know that you are in my prayers.

I have been thinking a lot about you and Jim and the moments we all shared. especially when he took us out on coffee dates, it's those little moments that will always comfort us.

What I always will remember about him is his kindness, their intellect and how he always made everyone feel free and welcome around him. He truly left a very deep wound on everyone that knew him.

Please know that you are not alone, a am always here for you, if you need to talk or anything at all, grief is never easy on anyone, we always need someone to be with in times like these.

All my love and deepest condolences.

Love
Karabo.

5.details:
how i know the person
telling a story that defines who they are, their kindness, humor and experience with them
what i like about them
why their birthday matters to me
5.model_generation:
Standing here today, I’m reminded of the first time we met in that crowded freshman dorm hallway. You paused your rush to help me pick up my scattered textbooks, flashing that easy grin. That moment revealed your kindness: always ready to lend a hand, even to a stranger. Over the years, your humor has been my refuge—like the time we got lost on our road trip and you turned our wrong turn into the funniest detour ever.

I admire how you listen, how you champion every dream I share, how your laughter fills any room. Your courage to face challenges inspires me daily. Today, your birthday matters because it celebrates you: the friend who never lets me face anything alone, whose generosity and warmth make every day brighter. I feel lucky every day to call you my friend. Here’s to celebrating your life, your spirit, and many more unforgettable adventures together. Happy birthday.
5.final_version:
Dear Maurey,

Today we are celebrating you, you are someone who's been a regular in my life. Even now i still remember the first day we met, and how quickly we warmed up to each other and how your humor made me feel like i belong. Whether it was late night talks, our adventures together and your strong support at all times, you have always shown up with live and humor.

one of our memories that are stuck on my head is when we went on a road trip and you got us lost but we ended up finding our way and made the most of it. This perfectly describes the type of person you are.

Watching you reach milestone makes me proud, you deserve every good thing coming your way, including happiness. I am very grateful to have met and known you and I cannot wait to see what the future holds for you.

this is to you, your heart and the beautiful life you're building.

Love
Karabo.
